structural.notes: Stepped foundation system confirmed for rolling terrain. Casita cluster foundations coordinated with arroyo setback on south boundary. Structural drawings integrated with architectural set.

electrical.notes: Single-line diagram complete. Panel schedules include main distribution, casita sub-panels, spa panel, restaurant panel, kitchen equipment circuits, pool electrical, and generator/UPS for hotel operations continuity.

lighting.notes: Design-led lighting layout complete for all guest experience zones — arrival sequence, lobby, casitas, spa, pool deck, restaurant. Exterior pathway lighting and landscape accent lighting specified. Dimming control system integrated.

water.notes: Plumbing and hydraulic layout complete for all zones including pool recirculation system, spa hydrotherapy plumbing, and restaurant kitchen. Greywater collection points integrated with plumbing layout and connected to greywater recycling system.

pool_mechanical.notes: Pool mechanical design complete — filtration system, circulation pump sizing, heating, chemical dosing. Pool deck drains integrated with greywater pre-treatment collection. Coordinates with water/plumbing discipline.

hvac.notes: Zoned HVAC system design complete — always required for hotel projects per commercial_hotel SOW template. Mini-split systems for all 20 casitas. Central HVAC units for spa treatment rooms, restaurant, and lobby. Energy efficiency targets confirmed. Equipment schedules finalized.

fire_suppression.notes: Sprinkler layout complete for all occupied areas per NOM-002-STPS and applicable BCS fire code. Fire alarm integration with AV/technology system specified. Design basis report issued.

solar.notes: Photovoltaic solar system design confirmed. Rooftop array capacity: 80 kWp across casita and spa rooftops. Ground-mounted array supplement: 20 kWp on south site area (outside arroyo buffer). System includes battery storage and grid tie-in for hotel-scale demand. Solar confirmed in scope per client special_features and SOW Phase 3.

greywater.notes: Greywater recycling system design complete. Collection from casita bathrooms, spa, and laundry. Treatment via biofilter and UV. Reuse for landscape irrigation and toilet flushing. System capacity sized for 20-unit hotel occupancy. Complies with NOM-015-CONAGUA. Confirmed in scope per client special_features and SOW Phase 3.

av_system.notes: AV/technology infrastructure layout complete — always required for hotel projects per commercial_hotel SOW template. Includes in-room AV for all 20 casitas (smart TV, sound, room control), spa background audio, restaurant sound system, lobby/public area AV, outdoor pool area audio, and network backbone (fiber main trunk, WiFi access points throughout property). Hotel PMS integration points specified. Security camera rough-in included.

arroyo_coordination_note: Seasonal arroyo on south boundary addressed across all disciplines. Hydrologic study setback requirements respected in foundation, drainage, and greywater outfall designs.
